sources.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
evidence: skills/ directory with 24 SKILL.md files in structured skill-name/SKILL.md layout
All skills follow consistent anatomy: frontmatter (name, description), Overview, When to Use, Process, Anti-Rationalizations table, Red Flags, Verification
Also includes .claude/skills/, .codex-plugin/, .gemini/commands/, .agents/plugins/ for multi-agent compatibility
4 agent personas (code-reviewer, test-engineer, security-auditor, web-performance-auditor)
75.3k stars, 50 contributors, 5 releases, MIT license
Last push: 2026-07-08 (very active)
sources.rationale: Highest-quality engineering skill collection. Structured SKILL.md format, active community, MIT license, multi-agent compatibility. Covers full dev lifecycle with unique anti-rationalization and verification patterns.

sources.name: ghaida/intent
evidence: 16 discipline-specific skills + 6 specialist agents for UX design and strategy
Structured .claude/skills/ layout with SKILL.md for each skill
Covers product design practice: strategy, research, experience design, QA, engineering handoff
72+ named deceptive/addictive/manipulative patterns cataloged in anti-pattern reference
8 deep reference documents: research methods, IA, interaction patterns, content strategy, accessibility, service design, measurement, ethical design
71 stars, 8 releases, CC0-1.0 license
Last push: 2026-05-31
sources.rationale: Unique design/UX domain with zero catalog coverage. Structured SKILL.md format, CC0 license (maximally permissive), active development. Covers a non-engineering domain with deep references and agent personas.

sources.name: 0x-Professor/Agent-Skills-Hub
evidence: 44 production-ready skills: 1 meta + 43 domain skills across cybersecurity, AI/ML+DL, agentic AI, daily automation, web engineering, and authorized pentest operations
Standardized skill contract: SKILL.md (YAML frontmatter), agents/openai.yaml, optional scripts/references/assets
Deterministic script CLI contract: --input, --output, --format, --dry-run
Security-first controls: pentest skills require --scope, --target, --i-have-authorization flags
Full CI/CD with GitHub Actions: smoke tests, scenario tests, security regression checks
Apache-2.0 license, 10 stars, 2 contributors
Last push: 2026-02-26
sources.rationale: Only source covering cybersecurity/pentesting domain (zero catalog coverage). Unique skill contracts with authorization gating and deterministic dry-run. Apache-2.0 license. Last activity 4+ months ago, so preview rather than active.

sources.name: agent-skills-hub/agent-skills-hub
evidence: 790+ skills across multiple domains (architecture, development, security, ops, business)
NPX-first CLI for multi-agent installation (Claude Code, Gemini, Cursor, Codex, Antigravity, OpenCode, AdaL, OpenClaw)
Structured SKILL.md format per skill with skills/ directory
Skills derived from antigravity-awesome-skills, K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills, coreyhaines31/marketingskills with attribution
Includes scientific skills (120+) and marketing skills — unique non-engineering domains
61 stars, 29 forks, MIT license
Last push: 2026-05-20

license.evidence: LICENSE file, ATTRIBUTION.md for upstream sources

sources.rationale: Broad multi-domain registry with substantial non-engineering coverage (scientific, marketing skills). Has clear attribution to upstream sources. Some skills are derivations from other sources — treat as preview for now and let extraction/normalization determine unique value.

sources.name: swell-agents/coding-skills
evidence: 11 skills: workflow skills (TDD, code review, architecture, committing, block issues, implementation) and rule skills (Python, Go, Solidity, Shell conventions, engineering philosophy)
Hybrid Anthropic Skills + Cursor MDC frontmatter for cross-platform compatibility
Includes parallel-review agents and slash commands
Optional PR-size CI gate (fails PRs over 1000 changed lines)
2 stars, MIT license, last push 2026-06-11
sources.rationale: Moderate overlap with addyosmani/agent-skills in software engineering domain (TDD, code review, architecture). Worth cataloging as a variant source but activation deferred until addyosmani is fully ingested.

sources.name: frhscopex/design-skill-os
evidence: Design intelligence layer for AI agents, synthesized from 10+ design books (Milton Glaser, Ellen Lupton, Michael Bierut, Donald Norman, etc.)
161+ reasoning rules, 60-30-10 color rule, golden ratio typography
Red Team protocol: heuristics, accessibility (WCAG AA), anti-schtick auditing
Cross-agent support: Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Antigravity, Copilot
35 stars, MIT license, 2 releases
Last push: 2026-04-17
sources.rationale: Moderate overlap with ghaida/intent in design domain. Unique design-book synthesis approach but only 1 consolidated skill. Keep as candidate — activate after intent is fully ingested to assess complementarity.
